title: Amtech C2950 3-in-1 Pipe Bender
availability_text: Only 10 left in stock (more on the way).
features: VERSATILE: This pipe bender accurately bends 6mm, 8mm and 10mm tubing between 0° - 180°
INCLUDING COPPER TUBING: It is particularly suitable for bending soft coil copper tube to EN1057 R220 tensile strength
DURABLE AND EASY TO USE: Made from strong aluminium alloy, it is very easy to use
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential tool for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Pipe bender See more
